name: create_grid_style
description: Create a new local layout grid style.

alignment.description: Alignment: STRETCH (default), CENTER, MIN, or MAX (COLUMNS/ROWS only)

color.description: Grid line color as hex e.g. #FF0000 (GRID only, default #FF0000)

count.description: Number of columns or rows (COLUMNS/ROWS only, default 12)

gutterSize.description: Gutter size in pixels (COLUMNS/ROWS only, default 16)

pattern.description: Grid pattern: GRID (default), COLUMNS, or ROWS

sectionSize.description: Grid cell size in pixels (GRID only, default 8)
